markdown.markdown:
```{r} source("R/load_data.R") source("R/scoring.R") source("R/dashboard.R") fixtures <- load_fixtures() results <- load_results() predictions <- load_predictions() scores <- score_predictions(predictions, results) leaderboard <- build_leaderboard(scores) todays_guesses <- current_day_guesses(predictions, fixtures, results) ``` ::: {.hero} ::: {.wc-hero} #Chum bring en hei! ⚽ Tipps 🏆 Leaderboard 📈 Points Race
Und die grosse Frage: holt sich Nina auch hier den Titel?
::: ::: ```{r} if (nrow(todays_guesses) == 0) { htmltools::tags$p("No matches with predictions for today yet.") } else { reactable::reactable( todays_guesses, searchable = TRUE, filterable = TRUE, defaultPageSize = 12, bordered = TRUE, striped = TRUE, columns = list( group = reactable::colDef(name = "Group", maxWidth = 90), match_id = reactable::colDef(name = "Game", maxWidth = 90), match = reactable::colDef(name = "Match"), player = reactable::colDef(name = "Player"), prediction = reactable::colDef(name = "Guess", maxWidth = 90), status = reactable::colDef(name = "Status"), actual_score = reactable::colDef(name = "Result", maxWidth = 90), submitted_at = reactable::colDef(name = "Submitted") ) ) } ``` ## Leaderboard ```{r} reactable::reactable( leaderboard, searchable = TRUE, defaultPageSize = 10, bordered = TRUE, striped = TRUE, highlight = TRUE, columns = list( rank = reactable::colDef(name = "Rank", maxWidth = 80), player = reactable::colDef(name = "Player"), points = reactable::colDef(name = "Points", maxWidth = 100), exact_scores = reactable::colDef(name = "Exact scores"), correct_outcomes = reactable::colDef(name = "Correct outcomes"), matches_scored = reactable::colDef(name = "Scored matches") ) ) ``` ## Points race over time Use the dropdown to switch between all groups and a single group. Click player names in the legend to show or hide players. ```{r} points_race_plot(scores, fixtures) ```
markdown.srcMarkdownNoYaml:
```{r} source("R/load_data.R") source("R/scoring.R") source("R/dashboard.R") fixtures <- load_fixtures() results <- load_results() predictions <- load_predictions() scores <- score_predictions(predictions, results) leaderboard <- build_leaderboard(scores) todays_guesses <- current_day_guesses(predictions, fixtures, results) ``` ::: {.hero} ::: {.wc-hero} #Chum bring en hei! ⚽ Tipps 🏆 Leaderboard 📈 Points Race
Und die grosse Frage: holt sich Nina auch hier den Titel?
::: ::: ## Today's guesses ```{r} if (nrow(todays_guesses) == 0) { htmltools::tags$p("No matches with predictions for today yet.") } else { reactable::reactable( todays_guesses, searchable = TRUE, filterable = TRUE, defaultPageSize = 12, bordered = TRUE, striped = TRUE, columns = list( group = reactable::colDef(name = "Group", maxWidth = 90), match_id = reactable::colDef(name = "Game", maxWidth = 90), match = reactable::colDef(name = "Match"), player = reactable::colDef(name = "Player"), prediction = reactable::colDef(name = "Guess", maxWidth = 90), status = reactable::colDef(name = "Status"), actual_score = reactable::colDef(name = "Result", maxWidth = 90), submitted_at = reactable::colDef(name = "Submitted") ) ) } ``` ## Leaderboard ```{r} reactable::reactable( leaderboard, searchable = TRUE, defaultPageSize = 10, bordered = TRUE, striped = TRUE, highlight = TRUE, columns = list( rank = reactable::colDef(name = "Rank", maxWidth = 80), player = reactable::colDef(name = "Player"), points = reactable::colDef(name = "Points", maxWidth = 100), exact_scores = reactable::colDef(name = "Exact scores"), correct_outcomes = reactable::colDef(name = "Correct outcomes"), matches_scored = reactable::colDef(name = "Scored matches") ) ) ``` ## Points race over time Use the dropdown to switch between all groups and a single group. Click player names in the legend to show or hide players. ```{r} points_race_plot(scores, fixtures) ```
